Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James Driscoll, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: SMS Financial XVI, LLC
Peter L. Balogh, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Gregory Buccola and Buccola Showroooms, LLC

After hearing, Application for Right to Attach Order as to: Gregory Buccola.
Protective Order issued against defendant Gregory Buccola, shall not transfer, sell encumber, hypotecate real property at 172 Shoreview Avenue, Pacifica.
Right to attach order granted as to both defendants for deposit accounts, with bussiness inventory, equipment and accounts in general, untangibles of defendant Buccola Showrooms LLC.
Denied as to defendant Buccola as to real property . Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
